Leon gets a call from one of the neighbors of a house throwing a party. It was supposed to be a simple noise complaint — till drugs were involved and all the alcohol scattered across the room when it was clearly past curfew.

Which was more surprising was when he found his partner slumped over the bathroom tiles. Clearly out of their mind.
